Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DashboardComponent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DashboardComponent
public class DashboardComponent extends Object

Java class for DashboardComponent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DashboardComponent">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="autoselectColumnsFromReport" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="chartAxisRange" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartRangeType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="chartAxisRangeMax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="chartAxisRangeMin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="chartSummary" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartSummary" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="componentChartTheme" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartTheme" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="componentType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentType"/>
         <element name="dashboardComponentContents" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentContent" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardDynamicValues" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardDynamicValue" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardFilterColumns" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardFilterColumn" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dashboardTableColumn" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardTableColumn" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="decimalPrecision" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="displayUnits" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartUnits" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="drillDownUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="drillEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="drillToDetailEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHover" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expandOthers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="flexComponentProperties" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardFlexTableComponentProperties" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="footer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="gaugeMax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="gaugeMin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="groupingColumn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="groupingSortProperties" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentGroupingSortProperties" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="header" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indicatorBreakpoint1" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indicatorBreakpoint2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indicatorHighColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indicatorLowColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indicatorMiddleColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="legendPosition" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChartLegendPosition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="maxValuesDisplayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="metricLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="page" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pageHeightInPixels" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="report" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scontrol" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scontrolHeightInPixels" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showPercentage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showPicturesOnCharts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showPicturesOnTables" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showRange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showValues" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortBy" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useReportChart" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getChartSummary

      public List<ChartSummary> getChartSummary()
      Gets the value of the chartSummary property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the chartSummary property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChartSummary().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ChartSummary

      Returns:
      The value of the chartSummary property.

    • getComponentChartTheme

      public ChartTheme getComponentChartTheme()
      Gets the value of the componentChartTheme property.
      Returns:
      possible object is ChartTheme

    • setComponentChartTheme

      public void setComponentChartTheme(ChartTheme value)
      Sets the value of the componentChartTheme property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is ChartTheme

      Gets the value of the componentType property.
      Returns:
      possible object is DashboardComponentType

    • setComponentType

      Sets the value of the componentType property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is DashboardComponentType

    • getDashboardComponentContents

      public List<DashboardComponentContent> getDashboardComponentContents()
      Gets the value of the dashboardComponentContents property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dashboardComponentContents property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDashboardComponentContents().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DashboardComponentContent

      Returns:
      The value of the dashboardComponentContents property.

    • getDashboardDynamicValues

      public List<DashboardDynamicValue> getDashboardDynamicValues()
      Gets the value of the dashboardDynamicValues property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dashboardDynamicValues property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDashboardDynamicValues().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DashboardDynamicValue

      Returns:
      The value of the dashboardDynamicValues property.

    • getDashboardFilterColumns

      public List<DashboardFilterColumn> getDashboardFilterColumns()
      Gets the value of the dashboardFilterColumns property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dashboardFilterColumns property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDashboardFilterColumns().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DashboardFilterColumn

      Returns:
      The value of the dashboardFilterColumns property.

    • getDashboardTableColumn

      public List<DashboardTableColumn> getDashboardTableColumn()
      Gets the value of the dashboardTableColumn property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dashboardTableColumn property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDashboardTableColumn().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DashboardTableColumn

      Returns:
      The value of the dashboardTableColumn property.

      value - allowed object is Boolean

    • getGroupingColumn

      public List<String> getGroupingColumn()
      Gets the value of the groupingColumn property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the groupingColumn property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getGroupingColumn().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the groupingColumn property.

    • getGroupingSortProperties

      public DashboardComponentGroupingSortProperties getGroupingSortProperties()

      Returns:

      Parameters:
